englishDefinitions: A firm and often playful way to say no to a man, boy, or someone being scolded.
Used to reject an idea, request, or action strongly.
examples: You want to borrow my car again? I don’t think so, mister.
I don’t think so, mister—you’re cleaning up this mess first.
He tried to leave without paying, and she said, “I don’t think so, mister.”
